scope: Six unique eight-second A-roll provider returns from one bounded avatar lineage
privacyBoundary: Aggregate measurements only; no raw corpus prompts, private identifiers, or provider credentials

method.visual: one-frame-per-second contact sheets plus four-frame terminal sheets from 7.00-8.00 seconds
method.audio: ffmpeg loudnorm full-clip measurement; return 6 was independently cross-checked with ebur128
method.pitch: band-limited autocorrelation estimate; approximate, not biometric identification
method.fineLipSync: UNKNOWN; no validated fine audiovisual alignment measurement was available

aggregate.audioReconciliation: The earlier -22.59 LUFS / -2.84 dBFS note for return 6 is superseded. Full-clip remeasurement of the same source produced loudnorm input -19.52 LUFS / -2.79 dBTP and an independent ebur128 cross-check of -19.1 LUFS / -2.8 dBTP.

decision.salvageRule: Require at least three consecutive post-speech stable frames, then trim after the last proven stable frame, master audio, and re-audit
